Class FixedDiscountPlan

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.plans.FixedDiscountPlan
All Implemented Interfaces:
DiscountPlans
public class FixedDiscountPlan extends Object implements DiscountPlans
Class that handles fixed discount plans and is the child class of DiscountPlans.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FixedDiscountPlan()
    Default constructor for FixedDiscountPlan class.
    FixedDiscountPlan(int customerID, int discountRate)
    Constructor for FixedDiscountPlan class used for adding a new fixed discount plan or editing an existing one.
    FixedDiscountPlan(int customerID, int discountRate, String customerName)
    Constructor for FixedDiscountPlan class used for fetching all fixed discount plans.

  • Constructor Details

    • FixedDiscountPlan

      public FixedDiscountPlan(int customerID, int discountRate, String customerName)
      Constructor for FixedDiscountPlan class used for fetching all fixed discount plans.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      discountRate - The discount rate of the customer.
      customerName - The name of the customer.

      discountRate - The discount rate of the customer.

      public void modifyRate(DiscountPlans fixedPlan)
      Modifies the discount rate of a fixed discount plan.
      Specified by:
      modifyRate in interface DiscountPlans
      Parameters:
      fixedPlan - The fixed discount plan to modify.

    • modifyRateForAll

      public static void modifyRateForAll(int newRate)
      Sets a discount rate for all fixed discount plans.
      Parameters:
      newRate - The new discount rate to set.

    • getCurrentDiscountRate

      public int getCurrentDiscountRate(int id)
      Just fetches the current discount rate of a fixed discount plan.
      Specified by:
      getCurrentDiscountRate in interface DiscountPlans
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the customer whose discount rate is to be fetched.
      Returns:
      The current discount rate of the customer.

    • addDiscount

      public void addDiscount(DiscountPlans fixedPlan)
      Adds a new fixed discount plan to the database.
      Specified by:
      addDiscount in interface DiscountPlans

    • removeDiscount

      public void removeDiscount(int dID)
      Deletes a discount plan and is used for when discount plans are changed. As the table's schema deletes on cascade, this method isn't directly used for the removal of a customer.
      Specified by:
      removeDiscount in interface DiscountPlans

    • getAllDiscounts

      public ArrayList<DiscountPlans> getAllDiscounts() throws org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException
      Gets all fixed discount plans from the database.
      Specified by:
      getAllDiscounts in interface DiscountPlans
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of DiscountPlans objects.
      Throws:
      org.jooq.exception.DataAccessException - If there is an error in the database operation.
